# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: myWebApp
  type: Microsoft.Web/sites
  apiVersion: 2015-08-01
  location: '[parameters('location')]'
  properties:
    serverFarmId: '[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('hostingPlanName'))]'
  resources:
  - name: mySqlDatabase
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: 2015-05-01-preview
    location: '[parameters('location')]'
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      edition: Standard
      maxsizebytes: '1073741824'
    resources:
    - type: connections
      apiVersion: 2018-07-01
      dependsOn:
      - '[parameters('myWebApp')]'
      - '[parameters('mySqlDatabase')]'
    properties:
      databases:
      - connectionString: '[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(parameters('mySqlDatabase')).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('databaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('administratorLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('administratorLoginPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]'
        name: MyDbConnection
        type: SqlAzure

- name: myStorageAccount
  type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  apiVersion: 2019-04-01
  location: '[parameters('location')]'
  properties:
    accountType: Standard_LRS

inputs:
- name: location
  type: string
  defaultValue: 'west us'
- name: hostingPlanName
  type: string
  defaultValue: myHostingPlan
- name: databaseName
  type: string
  defaultValue: myDatabase
- name: administratorLogin
  type: string
  defaultValue: myLogin
- name: administratorLoginPassword
  type: securestring
  defaultValue: myPassword
